commands.review_summary:
The PR guards doctor tool-allowlist owner collection against unreadable plugin id and contracts.tools metadata and adds two focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +68. Total +117 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main directly dereferences plugin.id and plugin.contracts?.tools in the doctor warning path, so a registry row with throwing accessors can abort collection. I did not execute the repro because this review is read-only, but the PR body also reports a focused red test before the fix.
